definition.jp: BLE (Bluetooth Low Energy) とは、Bluetoothの仕様の1つで、省電力の通信規格です。従来のBluetoothよりも通信速度が遅い分、省電力であるため、IoT機器での利用に適しています。BLEはボタン電池1つで数年稼働するといわれています。
definition.zh: 低功耗蓝牙（BLE）是蓝牙规范的一种，是一种省电的通信标准。虽然通信速度比传统蓝牙慢，但由于省电，适合用于IoT设备。据说BLE仅靠一颗纽扣电池就能运行数年。
definition.en: BLE (Bluetooth Low Energy) is one of the Bluetooth specifications and is a power-saving communication standard. Although its communication speed is slower than conventional Bluetooth, it consumes less power, making it suitable for use in IoT (Internet of Things) devices. BLE is said to be able to operate for several years on a single button battery.

definition.jp: LPWA (Low Power Wide Area) とは、省電力で広範囲の通信ができる無線通信です。数十kmの通信距離を持ちます。LTE (4G) よりも省電力であり、BLEよりも通信距離が長いという特徴があります。
definition.zh: LPWA（Low Power Wide Area）是一种省电且可进行大范围通信的无线通信。具有数十公里的通信距离。其特点是比LTE（4G）更省电，且通信距离比低功耗蓝牙（BLE）更长。
definition.en: LPWA (Low Power Wide Area) is a wireless communication technology that enables low-power, wide-area communication. It has a communication range of several tens of kilometers. It is characterized by lower power consumption than LTE (4G) and a longer communication range than BLE (Bluetooth Low Energy).
